settings.title: 1. Upload a photo
settings.text: Snap a pic of your pet or choose a favorite from your camera roll. Front-facing, well-lit photos work best.

settings.title: 2. Preview four styles
settings.text: Our AI generates your pet in four distinct art styles in about 15-20 seconds. Every portrait is reviewed by a real artist before production.

settings.title: 3. Pick your product
settings.text: See your pet on 20+ products, from framed prints and canvas to mugs, tees, and more. We handle printing and shipping.

settings.heading: Is the preview really free?
settings.row_content: Yes, completely free with no strings attached. Upload a photo, see your pet in all four art styles, and browse product mockups. You only pay if you decide to order.

settings.heading: What kind of photo should I use?
settings.row_content: A clear, front-facing photo where your pet's face is visible works best. Good lighting helps. The photo should be at least 500x500 pixels. Avoid heavy filters or extreme angles.

settings.heading: How long does the preview take?
settings.row_content: About 15-20 seconds for all four styles. Each style appears as it finishes generating, so you will start seeing results within a few seconds.

settings.heading: Will my pet's portrait look exactly like the preview?
settings.row_content: The preview is a close representation. Every ordered portrait is reviewed and refined by a real artist before production, so the final product may have subtle improvements in detail and quality.

settings.heading: How long will my previews be saved?
settings.row_content: Previews are saved for 48 hours by default. Enter your email during the preview and we will extend that to 30 days, plus send you a link to come back anytime.
